raw_consumer_statement: I am being scammed by a predatory merchant and CITI BANK is refusing to reverse the invalid subscription charges which continued after I attempted to cancel the service. The merchant states my attempts to cancel were unsuccessful ( through no fault of my own ) and refuses to refund me these erroneous and illegal charges. I filed a dispute with CITI BANK yet they decided to side with the merchant against me. I am being ripped off of {$200.00} dollars and the card company doesn't care that the activity was ILLEGAL. CITI BANK DOES NOT CARE ABOUT IT'S CUSTOMERS AND SUPPORTS MERCHANTS WHO VIOLATE FTC LAWS.
